expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify returns a live asynchronous Job id; the proxy creates a deterministic synthetic Job id for local delete-all staging.

notes: HAR-687 captures live Shopify guards for marketingActivityDeleteExternal with neither selector and marketingActivityCreateExternal immediately after marketingActivitiesDeleteAllExternal enqueues a delete-all job. The disposable conformance shop cannot currently create the campaign-level parent needed for the child-events delete guard because every tested channelHandle is rejected, and it has no discoverable non-external MarketingActivity for the native delete guard; focused Gleam runtime tests cover those local no-state-change branches while the fixture records the live setup blockers.
